authoritative-hint: ✓ games report a server-verified winner. Others settle when both players agree (or an admin decides).
awaiting-opponent: Waiting on the other player to confirm…
challenge-desc: Stake coins on a head-to-head match. Both stakes are escrowed and paid to the winner.
disputed: Reports disagree — sent to an admin
empty-mine: You haven't played any wager matches yet.
empty-open: No open challenges right now. Post one and stake some coins!
reported: Result reported — waiting on your opponent
title: Wager Matches
